  field AggregateError.Errors []error
  field CacheKey.Limit int
  field CacheKey.Offset int
  field CacheKey.Operation string
  field CacheKey.OrderBy string
  field CacheKey.Predicates string
  field CacheKey.Table string
  field Config.Table string
  field MutationError.Entity string
  field MutationError.Err error
  field MutationError.Op string
  field PrivacyError.Cause error
  field PrivacyError.Entity string
  field PrivacyError.Op string
  field PrivacyError.Rule string
  field QueryContext.Fields []string
  field QueryContext.Limit *int
  field QueryContext.Offset *int
  field QueryContext.Op string
  field QueryContext.Type string
  field QueryContext.Unique *bool
  field QueryError.Entity string
  field QueryError.Err error
  field QueryError.Op string
  field RollbackError.Err error
  field Schema.Interface Interface
  field ValidationError.Entity string
  field ValidationError.Err error
  field ValidationError.Field string
  field ValidationError.Name string
  field View.Schema Schema
  method AggregateError.Error() string
  method AggregateError.Unwrap() []error
  method Cache.Clear(context.Context) error
  method Cache.Delete(context.Context, string) error
  method Cache.DeletePrefix(context.Context, string) error
  method Cache.Get(context.Context, string) ([]byte, error)
  method Cache.Set(context.Context, string, []byte, time.Duration) error
  method CacheKey.String() string
  method ConstraintError.Error() string
  method ConstraintError.Message() string
  method ConstraintError.Unwrap() error
  method Edge.Descriptor() *github.com/syssam/velox/schema/edge.Descriptor
  method Field.Descriptor() *github.com/syssam/velox/schema/field.Descriptor
  method Index.Descriptor() *github.com/syssam/velox/schema/index.Descriptor
  method InterceptFunc.Intercept(Querier) Querier
  method Interceptor.Intercept(Querier) Querier
  method Interface.Annotations() []github.com/syssam/velox/schema.Annotation
  method Interface.Config() Config
  method Interface.Edges() []Edge
  method Interface.Fields() []Field
  method Interface.Hooks() []Hook
  method Interface.Indexes() []Index
  method Interface.Interceptors() []Interceptor
  method Interface.Mixin() []Mixin
  method Interface.Policy() Policy
  method Interface.Type()
  method Mixin.Annotations() []github.com/syssam/velox/schema.Annotation
  method Mixin.Edges() []Edge
  method Mixin.Fields() []Field
  method Mixin.Hooks() []Hook
  method Mixin.Indexes() []Index
  method Mixin.Interceptors() []Interceptor
  method Mixin.Policy() Policy
  method MutateFunc.Mutate(context.Context, Mutation) (Value, error)
  method Mutation.AddField(string, Value) error
  method Mutation.AddedEdges() []string
  method Mutation.AddedField(string) (Value, bool)
  method Mutation.AddedFields() []string
  method Mutation.AddedIDs(string) []Value
  method Mutation.ClearEdge(string) error
  method Mutation.ClearField(string) error
  method Mutation.ClearedEdges() []string
  method Mutation.ClearedFields() []string
  method Mutation.EdgeCleared(string) bool
  method Mutation.Field(string) (Value, bool)
  method Mutation.FieldCleared(string) bool
  method Mutation.Fields() []string
  method Mutation.OldField(context.Context, string) (Value, error)
  method Mutation.Op() Op
  method Mutation.RemovedEdges() []string
  method Mutation.RemovedIDs(string) []Value
  method Mutation.ResetEdge(string) error
  method Mutation.ResetField(string) error
  method Mutation.SetField(string, Value) error
  method Mutation.Type() string
  method MutationError.Error() string
  method MutationError.Unwrap() error
  method Mutator.Mutate(context.Context, Mutation) (Value, error)
  method NotFoundError.Error() string
  method NotFoundError.ID() any
  method NotFoundError.Is(error) bool
  method NotFoundError.Label() string
  method NotLoadedError.Edge() string
  method NotLoadedError.Error() string
  method NotSingularError.Count() int
  method NotSingularError.Error() string
  method NotSingularError.Is(error) bool
  method NotSingularError.Label() string
  method Op.Is(Op) bool
  method Op.String() string
  method Policy.EvalMutation(context.Context, Mutation) error
  method Policy.EvalQuery(context.Context, Query) error
  method PrivacyError.Error() string
  method PrivacyError.Unwrap() error
  method Querier.Query(context.Context, Query) (Value, error)
  method QuerierFunc.Query(context.Context, Query) (Value, error)
  method QueryContext.AppendFieldOnce(string) *QueryContext
  method QueryContext.Clone() *QueryContext
  method QueryError.Error() string
  method QueryError.Unwrap() error
  method RollbackError.Error() string
  method RollbackError.Unwrap() error
  method Schema.Annotations() []github.com/syssam/velox/schema.Annotation
  method Schema.Config() Config
  method Schema.Edges() []Edge
  method Schema.Fields() []Field
  method Schema.Hooks() []Hook
  method Schema.Indexes() []Index
  method Schema.Interceptors() []Interceptor
  method Schema.Mixin() []Mixin
  method Schema.Policy() Policy
  method Schema.Type()
  method TraverseFunc.Intercept(Querier) Querier
  method TraverseFunc.Traverse(context.Context, Query) error
  method Traverser.Traverse(context.Context, Query) error
  method ValidationError.Error() string
  method ValidationError.Unwrap() error
  method View.Annotations() []github.com/syssam/velox/schema.Annotation
  method View.Config() Config
  method View.Edges() []Edge
  method View.Fields() []Field
  method View.Hooks() []Hook
  method View.Indexes() []Index
  method View.Interceptors() []Interceptor
  method View.Mixin() []Mixin
  method View.Policy() Policy
  method View.Type()
const OpCreate Op
const OpDelete Op
const OpDeleteOne Op
const OpQueryAll untyped string
const OpQueryCount untyped string
const OpQueryExist untyped string
const OpQueryFirst untyped string
const OpQueryFirstID untyped string
const OpQueryGroupBy untyped string
const OpQueryIDs untyped string
const OpQueryOnly untyped string
const OpQueryOnlyID untyped string
const OpQuerySelect untyped string
const OpUpdate Op
const OpUpdateOne Op
func IsConstraintError(error) bool
func IsMutationError(error) bool
func IsNotFound(error) bool
func IsNotLoaded(error) bool
func IsNotSingular(error) bool
func IsPrivacyError(error) bool
func IsQueryError(error) bool
func IsRollbackError(error) bool
func IsValidationError(error) bool
func NewAggregateError(...error) error
func NewConstraintError(string, error) *ConstraintError
func NewMutationError(string, string, error) *MutationError
func NewNotFoundError(string) *NotFoundError
func NewNotFoundErrorWithID(string, any) *NotFoundError
func NewNotLoadedError(string) *NotLoadedError
func NewNotSingularError(string) *NotSingularError
func NewNotSingularErrorWithCount(string, int) *NotSingularError
func NewPrivacyError(string, string, string) *PrivacyError
func NewPrivacyErrorWithCause(string, string, string, error) *PrivacyError
func NewQueryContext(context.Context, *QueryContext) context.Context
func NewQueryError(string, string, error) *QueryError
func NewRollbackError(error) *RollbackError
func NewValidationError(string, error) *ValidationError
func QueryFromContext(context.Context) *QueryContext
func WithHooks[V Value, M any, PM interface{*M; Mutation}](context.Context, func(context.Context) (V, error), PM, []Hook) (V, error)
func WithInterceptors[V Value](context.Context, Query, Querier, []Interceptor) (V, error)
type AggregateError struct
type Cache interface
type CacheKey struct
type Config struct
type ConstraintError struct
type Edge interface
type Field interface
type Hook func(Mutator) Mutator
type Index interface
type InterceptFunc func(Querier) Querier
type Interceptor interface
type Interface interface
type Mixin interface
type MutateFunc func(context.Context, Mutation) (Value, error)
type Mutation interface
type MutationError struct
type Mutator interface
type NotFoundError struct
type NotLoadedError struct
type NotSingularError struct
type Op uint
type Policy interface
type PrivacyError struct
type Querier interface
type QuerierFunc func(context.Context, Query) (Value, error)
type Query interface
type QueryContext struct
type QueryError struct
type RollbackError struct
type Schema struct
type TraverseFunc func(context.Context, Query) error
type Traverser interface
type ValidationError struct
type Value interface
type View struct
type Viewer interface
var ErrNotFound error
var ErrNotSingular error
var ErrTxStarted error
